channel.title: Image Hosting on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Image Hosting on yexca'Blog

item.title: Fix "Bad credentials" Error When Uploading Images with PicX
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction While writing a post today, I found that PicX was no longer working and showed a Bad credentials error. Here is how to fix it. Solution The issue is simply that your GitHub Token has expired. You should have received an email titled [GitHub] Your personal access token has expired. The email contains three lines. Look for the second line starting with If this token is still needed, click the link provided, and …

item.title: Image Hosting Sites Summary
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction This article is a collection of free image hosting services I’ve gathered. I have personally used some of these. If you are looking to set up your own, I recommend reading Building a Free Image Host with PicX – yexca’Blog . 1. ImgTU (路过图床) Official Link: ImgTU – Free Image Upload, Professional Image Hosting

item.title: Build Your Own Free Image Hosting with PicX
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction When writing articles, I often need to insert images (though I haven’t used many lately). Hosting them on your own server consumes quite a bit of bandwidth, and the loading speeds aren’t always great. This is where image hosting comes in. However, most free image hosts suffer from disappearing images or slow speeds, so I started looking into self-hosted solutions. Renting a dedicated cloud server just for images is …
